en: Swift as the wind, quiet as the forest, fierce as fire, firm as the mountain
zh: 疾如风，徐如林，侵掠如火，不动如山

en: Still as bedrock gathering force of ten thousand tons; swift as thunder breaking ten thousand barriers
zh: 静如磐石蓄万钧之势，动如惊雷破万重之障

en: Dive deep without restlessness, gather strength without slack; when the moment comes, strike like thunder
zh: 沉潜不躁，蓄力不怠；时机一至，雷霆万钧

en: Lie low in Mediocristan, sharpen fuel in dead time — when Extremistan opens, one decisive strike wins all
zh: 于平均斯坦沉潜蛰伏，在垃圾时间磨砺燃料，待极端斯坦窗口期降临，一击制胜

en: Immovable as a mountain through dull years; fierce as fire when the era's window opens — long depth for one burst
zh: 不动如山熬尽平庸时光，侵掠如火抓住时代窗口，以长久沉淀，换一瞬爆发

en: Hide the edge on ordinary days, stack wisdom deep; when the moment knocks and guns sound, go all in
zh: 平日藏锋敛锐、厚积认知；时机临门、炮声响起，便一往无前、孤注一掷

en: As Heaven is vigorous, the noble strive without cease; as Earth is receptive, the noble carry all with virtue
zh: 天行健，君子以自强不息；地势坤，君子以厚德载物

en: Though trapped in ordinary days, keep sharpening the blade; when fortune meets you, break the dark and ride the wind
zh: 纵困于平庸日常，亦磨锋砺刃；待风云际会一刻，便破暗乘风

en: Upward is the master key through all darkness; self-possession is the only way across every hardship
zh: 向上，是冲破一切黑暗的终极钥匙；自持，是渡尽万般苦难的唯一归途

en: Though emotions surge and life pushes back, a heart aimed high finds no dead end
zh: 纵情绪翻涌、世事刁难，心向高处，终无绝境

en: Though feet are in mud, the heart faces the clouds; though life is uncertain, the steps never stop
zh: 纵身处泥泞，心向青云；纵世事难料，步履不停

en: Hardship grinds the bone but not the original intent; the world distracts the body but not the edge
zh: 困厄磨骨，不破初心；尘俗扰身，不失锋芒
